data.title: Ripple Labs aims to raise $1 billion for XRP-centered treasury through SPAC, using its own XRP.
data.description: Ripple Labs, a leading blockchain company, is leading an effort to generate a minimum of $1 billion for the establishment of a cryptocurrency treasury that will focus on XRP. The initiative involves the formation of a special purpose acquisition company to raise the funds, as reported by Bloomberg on Thursday. Sources familiar with the matter stated that the raised funds will be directed towards a new digital-asset treasury. Ripple Labs will also be contributing a portion of its XRP to this treasury. The company has not responded to requests for comment from Benzinga. This move reflects an ongoing trend among corporations to set up XRP-focused treasuries. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Earnings report on October 17, 2025: SLB to report $0.67/share on $8.93B revenue, STT $2.64/share on $3.47B, AXP $3.98/share on $18.03B.
data.description: Before the market opens, several companies are set to report their quarterly earnings. Schlumberger (SLB) is expected to announce earnings of $0.67 per share on a revenue of $8.93 billion. State Street (STT) is projected to report earnings of $2.64 per share with revenue totaling $3.47 billion. American Express (AXP) is estimated to reveal earnings of $3.98 per share on a revenue of $18.03 billion. Autoliv (ALV) is also anticipated to report its quarterly earnings. For the full story, refer to the article available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: The Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy Therapeutics market is expected to reach $6.64 billion by 2033, growing at a CAGR of 13.2%.
data.description: On October 17, 2025, in Austin, Texas and Tokyo, it was reported that the Global Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy (DMD) Therapeutics Market was valued at US $2.19 billion in 2024. Predictions indicate a substantial increase to US $6.64 billion by 2033, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 13.2% during the period from 2025 to 2033. This notable growth...

data.title: Bang & Olufsen A/S received announcement from Azura Partners Boreale SARL, holding of shares/voting rights fell below 5%.
data.description: Bang & Olufsen A/S recently disclosed a significant shareholder announcement from Azura Partners Boreale SARL in accordance with the Danish Capital Markets Act. The announcement revealed that as of October 16, 2025, Azura Partners SARL's ownership of shares and voting rights in Bang & Olufsen A/S has dropped to less than 5 percent of the total number of shares and voting rights.

data.title: 138th Canton Fair emphasizes innovation, intelligence, sustainability. 240,000+ buyers registered. 10% increase from last session.
data.description: In Guangzhou, China, the 138th China Import and Export Fair (Canton Fair) began on October 15, 2025. The Fair has attracted over 240,000 buyers from 218 markets who pre-registered by October 13, indicating a 10% rise in attendance for this session compared to the previous year.

data.title: TCL announces Team TCL EU for Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026, partnering with Europe's top athletes.
data.description: Highlighting the excellence of Europe's top athletes in winter sports, TCL, a prominent player in consumer electronics and a Worldwide Olympic Partner, introduces Team TCL EU on October 17, 2025. This elite team consists of renowned athletes aiming to embody the values of sportsmanship, innovation, and the Olympic spirit.
